blocks.content: The family computer was in the den, which meant AIM was a semi-public activity in the Jenkins household. Kit's mom didn't read over his shoulder but she walked through the room, and he had learned to angle the monitor slightly left.
He logged on at eight-fifteen. Eli was already there — his away message read: presidential campaign: PENDING — and the group chat was titled MILLHAVEN MIDDLE SURVIVORS.
ok who had the worst teacher this year i'll go first: MR PATTERSON
daisy he assigned homework ON THE FIRST DAY
this is not a lol situation kit this is a CRISIS
A new window opened. Kit almost didn't catch it — it blinked at the bottom of the screen and he nearly closed it by accident.
hey its brooke from school -- derek gave me your sn hope thats ok
Kit looked at the screen. In the group window, Eli was still going. Daisy's icon showed active.
oh hey yeah no its cool
